achievements.title: Rolling Around
achievements.description: Defeat the rolling guardian without getting behind them.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Learning About Lore
achievements.description: Speak to the lore keeper before starting your journey.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Trimming the Herbs
achievements.description: In the first major room, slash apart the flowers in the top right.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Homeless Heracross
achievements.description: In the big room to the left of the Moss Grotto spawn, destroy the beetle husk geo rock.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: I Wanna (Geo) Rock!
achievements.description: Destroy all three geo rocks in the second climbing room in one go. This primes on the first destroyed.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: SHAW Like a Bee
achievements.description: Defeat the evil bee in the abandoned city within Moss Grotto without using energy.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Anticlimatic Staredown
achievements.description: Prepare for a showdown after the bee--nevermind.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Don't Be Such a Drip
achievements.description: Turn off the water fountain looking thing in the top of the big room in Deep Docks.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: That Was a Hoot!
achievements.description: Scare away the owl like creature in Deep Docks before the lava finishes erupting ten times.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: The Key to Pets
achievements.description: Find the key by the sleeping cocoon in Deep Docks.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: No Goron Mask This Game, Sorry
achievements.description: Collect both mask shards in the Deep Docks.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: GIT GUD at the Gauntlet
achievements.description: Clear the Deep Docks enemy gauntlet within 25 seconds.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: ADIO the Adversary
achievements.description: Defeat your rival in Deep Docks without healing.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Well Earned Respite
achievements.description: Take a rest on the newly available bench after defeating your rival in Deep Docks.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Steel Soul Practice
achievements.description: Clear Moss Grotto and Deep Docks back to back without dying. Retry from the main menu.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000
